pages.text:
CharCoat IS
(4 Hour Fire Rated Sealant)
PRODUCT DESCRIPTION
AUTHOR SEAN RITCHIE
CharCoat IS is designed to prevent the spread of fire and smoke
VERSION 4.0
through openings in fire rated walls and floors including openings PURPOSE/CHANGES COMPANY ADDRESS
formed around building service penetra(cid:415)ons. DATE PUBLISHED JAN 2025
CharCoat IS will also maintain the acous(cid:415)c design performance in
walls and floors. CharCoat IS cures when it is subjected to
atmospheric condi(cid:415)ons, however it will retain a degree of elas(cid:415)cty TECHNICAL DATA
for joint movement. Under fire exposure, CharCoat IS creates a
Condition Water based acrylic sealant
robust fire seal by the forma(cid:415)on of a durable intumescent char.
Specific gravity / Density 1.61
CharCoat IS can be used with a suitable filling material, i.e. stone Flash point None
wool or backing material in order to secure correct width to depth Reaction to fire Class D-s1, d1
Expansion in fire 1 : 2-3
ra(cid:415)o and to reduce the shrinking of the sealant during curing.
Non-sticky Max. 75 minutes
Minimum depth and maximum width are included in the installa-
Film forming Max. 25 minutes
(cid:415)on instruc(cid:415)ons. Thermal ac(cid:415)va(cid:415)on takes place at about 180°C
Totally hardened 3 to 5 days depending on thickness and temperature
when the material will expand (intumesce) and prevent the passage
Flexibility 12.5% according to ISO 11600
of fire and smoke for periods up to 4 hours.
Durability/service Class Z2
BWR 3 Use category IA1, S/W3
PROPERTIES Thermal conduct. 0.845 W/mK (+/- 3%) @ 20mm depth
Storage 18 months stored in unopened cartridges. To be
• High end formula, cer(cid:415)fied Worldwide
stored in temperatures between 5°C and 35°C
• Classified for fire sealing all types of construc(cid:415)ons and building
Working life 30 years
service penetra(cid:415)ons
Service temperature -20 to +70°C
• Very high sound insula(cid:415)on
Application temp. +5 to +35°C
• Low emissions - environmentally and user friendly
Compatibility Suitable for use with most materials, but should not
• Simple to apply with a smooth surface finish be used In direct contact with bituminous materials
• Permanently flexible Limitations Should not be used in permanently damp areas
• No priming necessary for applica(cid:415)on to most materials
• Suitable for most surfaces, included concrete, masonry, steel, Classification CE-marked - Sealant for fire rated joints and
gypsum, glass, plas(cid:415)cs and most non-porous surfaces penetrations class EI 240
• Hardens quickly, tack free a(cid:332)er 1 hour (the fire performance Standard colours White
Colour codes White: RAL 9002 (Approx.)
specifica(cid:415)on of the joint filler has been derived when the joint
filler has been let to cure for a month)
Packaging Box containing 25 cartridges each 310 ml (1800/pallet)
• 18 months storage (cid:415)me (under correct condi(cid:415)ons)
Box containing 12 foil packed each 600 ml (990/pallet)
• 30 years working life
5kg Pails
20kg Pails
SOUND INSULATION Warranty 25 Years / Product only. Please refer to our full Terms
and Conditions of sale.
Descrip(cid:415)on Sound Reduc(cid:415)on
Single sided seal ≥12mm depth 62 dB
Double sided seal ≥12mm depth > 62 dB
CharCoat IS has been tested at EXOVA BM Trada (UKAS accredited); according to
EN ISO 10140-2:2010. Usage of any backing material is op(cid:415)onal, due to the tests
being conducted with sealant only.

rows: CharCoat IS (4 Hour Fire Rated Sealant) PRODUCT DESCRIPTION AUTHOR SEAN RITCHIE CharCoat IS is designed to prevent the spread of fire and smoke VERSION 4.0 through openings in fire rated walls and floors including openings PURPOSE/CHANGES COMPANY ADDRESS formed around building service penetra(cid:415)ons. DATE PUBLISHED JAN 2025 CharCoat IS will also maintain the acous(cid:415)c design performance in walls and floors. CharCoat IS cures when it is subjected to atmospheric condi(cid:415)ons, however it will retain a degree of elas(cid:415)cty TECHNICAL DATA for joint movement. Under fire exposure, CharCoat IS creates a Condition Water based acrylic sealant robust fire seal by the forma(cid:415)on of a durable intumescent char. Specific gravity / Density 1.61 CharCoat IS can be used with a suitable filling material, i.e. stone Flash point None wool or backing material in order to secure correct width to depth Reaction to fire Class D-s1, d1 Expansion in fire 1 : 2-3 ra(cid:415)o and to reduce the shrinking of the sealant during curing. Non-sticky Max. 75 minutes Minimum depth and maximum width are included in the installa- Film forming Max. 25 minutes (cid:415)on instruc(cid:415)ons. Thermal ac(cid:415)va(cid:415)on takes place at about 180°C Totally hardened 3 to 5 days depending on thickness and temperature when the material will expand (intumesce) and prevent the passage Flexibility 12.5% according to ISO 11600 of fire and smoke for periods up to 4 hours. Durability/service Class Z2 BWR 3 Use category IA1, S/W3 PROPERTIES Thermal conduct. 0.845 W/mK (+/- 3%) @ 20mm depth Storage 18 months stored in unopened cartridges. To be • High end formula, cer(cid:415)fied Worldwide stored in temperatures between 5°C and 35°C • Classified for fire sealing all types of construc(cid:415)ons and building Working life 30 years service penetra(cid:415)ons Service temperature -20 to +70°C • Very high sound insula(cid:415)on Application temp. +5 to +35°C • Low emissions - environmentally and user friendly Compatibility Suitable for use with most materials, but should not • Simple to apply with a smooth surface finish be used In direct contact with bituminous materials • Permanently flexible Limitations Should not be used in permanently damp areas • No priming necessary for applica(cid:415)on to most materials • Suitable for most surfaces, included concrete, masonry, steel, Classification CE-marked - Sealant for fire rated joints and gypsum, glass, plas(cid:415)cs and most non-porous surfaces penetrations class EI 240 • Hardens quickly, tack free a(cid:332)er 1 hour (the fire performance Standard colours White Colour codes White: RAL 9002 (Approx.) specifica(cid:415)on of the joint filler has been derived when the joint filler has been let to cure for a month) Packaging Box containing 25 cartridges each 310 ml (1800/pallet) • 18 months storage (cid:415)me (under correct condi(cid:415)ons) Box containing 12 foil packed each 600 ml (990/pallet) • 30 years working life 5kg Pails 20kg Pails SOUND INSULATION Warranty 25 Years / Product only. Please refer to our full Terms and Conditions of sale. Descrip(cid:415)on Sound Reduc(cid:415)on Single sided seal ≥12mm depth 62 dB Double sided seal ≥12mm depth > 62 dB CharCoat IS has been tested at EXOVA BM Trada (UKAS accredited); according to EN ISO 10140-2:2010. Usage of any backing material is op(cid:415)onal, due to the tests being conducted with sealant only.
AUTHOR SEAN RITCHIE VERSION 4.0 PURPOSE/CHANGES COMPANY ADDRESS DATE PUBLISHED JAN 2025

| Condition | Water based acrylic sealant |
| --- | --- |
| Specific gravity / Density | 1.61 |
| Flash point | None |
| Reaction to fire | Class D-s1, d1 |
| Expansion in fire | 1 : 2-3 |
| Non-sticky | Max. 75 minutes |
| Film forming | Max. 25 minutes |
| Totally hardened | 3 to 5 days depending on thickness and temperature |
| Flexibility | 12.5% according to ISO 11600 |
| Durability/service | Class Z2 |
| BWR 3 | Use category IA1, S/W3 |
| Thermal conduct. | 0.845 W/mK (+/- 3%) @ 20mm depth |
| Storage | 18 months stored in unopened cartridges. To be stored in temperatures between 5°C and 35°C |
| Working life | 30 years |
| Service temperature | -20 to +70°C |
| Application temp. | +5 to +35°C |
| Compatibility | Suitable for use with most materials, but should not be used In direct contact with bituminous materials |
| Limitations | Should not be used in permanently damp areas |
| Classification | CE-marked - Sealant for fire rated joints and penetrations class EI 240 |
| Standard colours | White |
| Colour codes | White: RAL 9002 (Approx.) |
| Packaging | Box containing 25 cartridges each 310 ml (1800/pallet) Box containing 12 foil packed each 600 ml (990/pallet) 5kg Pails 20kg Pails |
| Warranty | 25 Years / Product only. Please refer to our full Terms and Conditions of sale. |

| Descrip(cid:415)on | Sound Reduc(cid:415)on |
| --- | --- |
| Single sided seal ≥12mm depth | 62 dB |
| Double sided seal ≥12mm depth | > 62 dB |
